nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SAFFLOWER FLOWER/(ACHILLEA MILLEFOLIUM/CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER/LEAF/STEM)/(VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS/VITEX AGNUS-CASTUS FRUIT)/RHUS CHINENSIS GALL/(CAMELLIA SINENSIS/NETTLE LEAF)/DICHROA FEBRIFUGA ROOT/GRAPE SEED/(JUNIPERUS COMMUNIS STEM/LEAF)/ACACIA CATECHU WOOD/GOLDENROD/HYPERICUM PERFORATUM EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: This is the extract of the flowers of Carthamus tinctorius; the flowers, leaves, and stems of Achillea millefolium, and Calendula officinalis; the fruits of Vaccinium myrtillus, and Vitex agnus-Castus; the galls of Rhus chinensis; the leaves of Camellia sinensis, and Urtica dioica; the roots of Dichroa febrifuga; the seeds of Vitis vinifera; the stems and leaves of Juniperus communis; the wood of Acacia catechu; the whole plants, Hypericum perforatum, and Solidago virgaurea.
inciName: SAFFLOWER FLOWER/(ACHILLEA MILLEFOLIUM/CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER/LEAF/STEM)/(VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS/VITEX AGNUS-CASTUS FRUIT)/RHUS CHINENSIS GALL/(CAMELLIA SINENSIS/NETTLE LEAF)/DICHROA FEBRIFUGA ROOT/GRAPE SEED/(JUNIPERUS COMMUNIS STEM/LEAF)/ACACIA CATECHU WOOD/GOLDENROD/HYPERICUM PERFORATUM EXTRACT
